name: Vladislav Prokhorov
intro:
Creating performant interfaces with React and TypeScript.
Focus on clean code, animations, and user experience.
bio: Hi! I'm Vladislav, a frontend developer. I work with state management and data persistence using {{zustand}}, interact with external APIs, create animations and UI effects with {{framer}}, and improve user interfaces and app interactions. This helps to build more dynamic, responsive, and user-friendly web applications.
project1Items: Form with validation and password check using React Hook Form
Sales charts: line, pie, and scatter charts with Recharts
Product cards with favorites using Context API
project2Items: Displaying full information about each country
title: Selected Work

projects.title: Bouton Akkermar
projects.description: Implemented 4 pages. Added catalog filtering, separate product pages (bouquets, gifts), and a payment modal. Data is stored in Supabase, and the catalog is rendered from the database. A contact form is included.

projects.title: Perfume Website
projects.description: Created a perfume website with an order form where user data automatically goes to Excel, routing across 4 pages, swipers, and product filtering for easy selection.

projects.title: Country API App
projects.description: Implemented an app to explore countries using an API, including a landing page, all countries page with filtering, modals, and a detailed page for each country with favorites functionality.

projects.title: Dashboard App
projects.description: A sales dashboard was developed with registration and password validation, the ability to filter sales, add products to favorites, and visualize data through various charts.

contact.title: Ready to build something great?
contact.subtitle: Open for offers and international collaboration.

footer.slogan: Engineering quality into every line of code.
